abstract: Inside the LW-VRE workflow studio, the marine habitat suitability predictions (monthly and decadal) was selected. The Aphiaid selection was 'Phoca vitulina', startdate 1 January 2000, end date 31 december 2019, also copernicus marine username and password provided.
name: T5.1.2 Run model on LW-VRE for harbor seal
